data.title: Harden web_search egress: catch fragmented exfil + PII (post-MVP)

data.body: Discovered in NAVI-5 review. Current _egress_check (broker.py) is a backstop: blocks single tokens >=40 chars, sk-/AKIA/JWT/long-hex patterns, and length>512. GAP: sensitive data fragmented across many short words (each <40 chars, total <512) slips through; PII (emails/SSNs) not detected (TODO in code). Spec §6.2 frames egress as a backstop, so acceptable for MVP. Post-MVP: add entropy/aggregate-length heuristics + PII patterns; consider denying queries that echo large verbatim spans from run context.

REVIEW (agent:claude-opus-4-reviewer, cold review of commit a64b1b8).

REVIEWED: plan task_01KTJ2G66EPJFCXW9YVF4X9WTQ.md + full diff (broker.py, test_broker.py, test_eval_egress.py). Migration file confirmed NOT in diff (the ~37 Alembic mypy errors are pre-existing, out of scope).

COMMANDS:
- ruff check . -> All checks passed!
- mypy src/navi/broker.py tests/test_eval_egress.py tests/test_broker.py -> Success: no issues found in 3 source files
- pytest -rs -> 111 passed, 1 skipped (skip = test_sap_review.py:104 NAVI_LIVE_TESTS live gate, acceptable).

CRITERIA:
1. _egress_check & broker() signatures UNCHANGED -> PASS.
2. No existing block weakened; original 6 _EXFIL_QUERIES + all test_deny_egress_* present, unmodified, passing; new checks run AFTER existing ones (order preserved, DENY-only) -> PASS.
3. New positive cases (pii_email, pii_ssn hyphen, pii_ssn_spaces, fragmented_hex, fragmented_digit) all Denied with 'egress' in reason -> PASS. Verified ratios: frag_hex 33/36=0.92, frag_digit 35/36=0.97.
4. 4 negative research queries Allowed, not egress-denied -> PASS. Verified ratios sit clear of 0.5: sap_fiori 0.36, long_natural well under, versions 0.44 (closest, acceptable margin), guid_mention 0.375 (and below 32-char floor: 18 hexlike).
5. ruff clean; 3 changed files mypy-clean -> PASS.
6. Full pytest green -> PASS.
7. Docstring documents PII + fragmented classes; verbatim-span # TODO(scope): present and accurate (correctly cites RunContext lacking corpus + broker/caller signature churn) -> PASS.
8. Spec 6.2 remains accurate, no edit needed -> PASS.

PURITY: _egress_check remains pure/deterministic, no I/O -> confirmed.

ADVERSARIAL FINDINGS:
- Bypass (accepted residual): the spec frames egress as a backstop, not airtight. A secret under 32 hexlike chars, or base64 with many non-hex letters dropping ratio below 0.5, still slips. Plan acknowledges this (Decision 2). Acceptable for a backstop. Not a fail.
- False-positive (MINOR NOTE, not blocking): constructible legit queries CAN trip the gate -- CSS hex color lists ('#deadbe #c0ffee...' ratio 0.71), two+ git commit hashes ('a1b2c3d4e5f6 ... f6e5d4c3b2a1' 0.70), queries quoting example hashes (0.72). These would be DENIED. MAC-address (0.54 single, 0.59 two) and chem-formula (0.46) queries stay clear. Severity MINOR because: (a) these query shapes are implausible for a read-only SAP role-design/research workbench; (b) the deny is surfaced to the model for reformulation, not a hard user failure; (c) the plan pre-reasoned and accepted this 0.5/32 tradeoff explicitly. Recommend a follow-up note if web research scope later broadens to dev/git topics.
- Order/short-circuit: new checks appended after cred patterns; no existing reason string altered; no test reason dependency broken -> confirmed.

VERDICT: PASS
